description: agent-action whose signed_at is after the cited delegation's expires_at — verifier MUST reject with E_OUT_OF_WINDOW per SPEC §8.1 step 11

expected.rejection_reason: v01 expires at 2026-04-29T12:00:00Z; this action's signed_at is 2026-04-30T00:00:00Z, which violates D.issued_at <= A.signed_at < D.expires_at. The exercised scope itself is in-bounds — the failure is purely temporal.

harness_assertion: If a verifier evaluates this action at any `now` after 2026-04-29T12:00:00Z, §8.1 step 6 (E_EXPIRED on the delegation) and step 11 (E_OUT_OF_WINDOW on the action) BOTH fire. Conformant verifiers return whichever they hit first per the §8.1 ordering — implementations evaluating delegation-first SHOULD return E_EXPIRED; evaluating action-first SHOULD return E_OUT_OF_WINDOW. This vector asserts E_OUT_OF_WINDOW because the canonical §8.1 ordering visits step 11 (action lifetime) for any action whose signed_at is provably out of bounds, even if the delegation is also expired at `now`. Implementations MAY treat E_EXPIRED as an acceptable substitute when both conditions hold.
